name: rsync
text:
rsync -azP --rsync-path="sudo -u netplov -H rsync" index.php chat:/home/netplov

rsync -azP --rsync-path="sudo -n -u netplov -H rsync" "$FilePath$" chat:/home/netplov/"$FileName$"

rsync -azP --rsync-path="sudo -u godforsaken -H rsync" app/customer/controller/Customer.php chat:/home/godforsaken/htdocs/chat/app/customer/controller/Customer.php

rsync -azP --rsync-path="sudo -u rel-uassist -H rsync" app/customer/controller/Customer.php rel:/home/rel-uassist/htdocs/chat/app/customer/controller/Customer.php

rsync -azP --rsync-path="sudo -u rel-uassist -H rsync" app/chat/service/ChatStatsService.php rel:/home/rel-uassist/htdocs/app/chat/service/ChatStatsService.php

rsync -azP --rsync-path="sudo -u rel-uassist -H rsync" public/js/customer/components/customer.report/[customer.report.ts](http://customer.report.ts/) rel:/home/rel-uassist/htdocs/public/js/customer/components/customer.report/[customer.report.ts](http://customer.report.ts/)
